payload.answer: I won’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or automatically save every future message. I only retain appropriate durable memories when they meet memory criteria.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy and store all future content, not a durable user fact or relationship.

repair_options: Ask to remember a specific durable preference, fact, or relationship.
Provide explicit, bounded information you want saved.
